label: String M: stations label
url: String M: URL to acces the stations data
lines: String : ligne id of stations passing at this stations

directions.keys: String: direction id of theline in the form Lineid_type_minutes

disabled_friendly: Boolean O: tells if the stations is accessible for low mobility persones
has_bike_parking: Boolean O: tells if the stations has a parking for bikes
has_car_parking: Boolean O: tells if the stations has a car parking
opening_hour: String O: opening hour of the stations
clossing_hour: String O: closing hour of the stations
